steps.name: review-project-state
steps.description: Aggregate project state (tasks, suggestions, costs, answers) and present to researcher.

steps.name: discuss-decisions
steps.description: Structured discussion with researcher; agree on DSGC channel-testbed task and two deferred comparison ports.

steps.name: apply-decisions
steps.description: Create t0022 (active), t0023 and t0024 (intervention_blocked with intervention files).

steps.name: finalize
steps.description: Write results, step logs, session capture, run verificators, PR, merge.
